commands.author: Solvely-Colin

target.title: fix: unify Android Voice setup readiness
target.body:
Closes #98268

AI-assisted: yes. Sanitized transcript logs were not included.

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where Android users opening Voice, Realtime Talk, Dictation, or Voice Setup could see inconsistent configured/unconfigured state when Gateway Talk catalog readiness differed between realtime voice and realtime transcription. It also resolves a problem where Talk/Dictation startup failures could leave only clipped status text instead of durable setup guidance or readable provider details.

## Why This Change Was Made

Android now derives Realtime Talk and Dictation readiness from the Gateway `talk.catalog` / `talk.config` contract through one shared readiness model used by both the Voice tab and Voice Setup. Startup/provider failures stay on Voice with a persistent issue panel, setup action, and sanitized expandable details, without changing Gateway/provider implementation or unrelated Android onboarding/settings flows.

The readiness gate treats confirmed catalog setup failures differently from unknown catalog state: confirmed unconfigured or empty provider rows route to Voice Setup, while catalog-load failures or unmatched active provider aliases leave the Gateway session API authoritative instead of blocking Talk/Dictation locally.

## User Impact

Users now see the same nouns and configured truth on Voice and Voice Setup: Realtime Talk can need setup while Dictation is ready, and both surfaces say so consistently. When provider startup fails, users stay in the Voice flow and can open setup or expand sanitized details instead of getting bounced back with a clipped one-line error.

## Evidence

- Focused Android unit tests passed after the latest review fixes:

```shell
JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home' ANDROID_HOME="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="$HOME/Library/Android/sdk" ./gradlew --no-daemon :app:testPlayDebugUnitTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.GatewayTalkSetupReadinessTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.ui.VoiceScreenLogicTest --tests ai.openclaw.app.voice.TalkModeManagerTest
# BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 16s
# 30 actionable tasks: 5 executed, 25 up-to-date
```

- Whitespace check passed:

```shell
git diff --check
```

- Autoreview passed clean against refreshed `origin/main`:

```shell
.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main
# autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported
# overall: patch is correct (0.86)
```

- Local emulator proof captured on `OpenClaw_FinalProof_API_36` with the Play debug app installed. Visual artifacts were kept outside the repository per PR artifact policy, scanned for obvious secret-shaped strings, and not committed.

Voice tab readiness and persistent setup issue panel:

![Android Voice readiness showing Realtime Talk needs setup and Dictation ready](https://files.catbox.moe/3qsm30.png)

Voice Setup using the same Gateway catalog-derived rows:

![Android Voice Setup showing Realtime Talk needs setup and Dictation ready](https://files.catbox.moe/803w5i.png)

Voice to Voice Setup flow proof:

![Android Voice setup flow GIF](https://files.catbox.moe/17o7k5.gif)
